content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the provided image into a JSON format. **Image Analysis:** The image is a table of contents page from a Texas Instruments datasheet for the TPS562200 and TPS563200. **Structure:** 1. **Header:** Contains the part numbers, document date, and Texas Instruments logo. 2. **Table of Contents:** A two-column list of sections and their corresponding page numbers. 3. **Revision History:** A section titled "4 Revision History" with a note and a list of changes. 4. **Changes from Revision D to E:** A list of changes with page numbers. 5. **Changes from Revision C to D:** A list of changes with page numbers. 6. **Changes from Revision B to C:** A list of changes with page numbers. 7. **Footer:** Contains page number, "Submit Document Feedback", copyright information, and product folder links. **Extraction Strategy:** I will extract the text content, preserving the structure as much as possible, and format it into a JSON list of objects. Each object will represent a section or a list item. **Step-by-step extraction:** 1. **Header:** * TPS562200, TPS563200 * SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023 * TEXAS INSTRUMENTS logo and website. 2. **Table of Contents:** * Title: Table of Contents * List items: * 1 Features...1 * 2 Applications...1 * 3 Description...1 * 4 Revision History...2 * 5 Pin Configuration and Functions...4 * 6 Specifications...5 * 6.1 Absolute Maximum Ratings(1)...5 * 6.2 ESD Ratings...5 * 6.3 Recommended Operating Conditions...5 * 6.4 Thermal Information...6 * 6.5 Electrical Characteristics...7 * 6.6 Timing Requirements...7 * 6.7 Typical Characteristics TPS562200...8 * 6.8 Typical Characteristics TPS563200...10 * 7 Detailed Description...12 * 7.1 Overview...12 * 7.2 Functional Block Diagram...12 * 7.3 Feature Description...13 * 7.4 Device Functional Modes...14 * 8 Application and Implementation...15 * 8.1 Application Information...15 * 8.2 Typical Applications...15 * 8.3 Power Supply Recommendations...26 * 8.4 Layout...26 * 9 Device and Documentation Support...28 * 9.1 Device Support...28 * 9.2 Receiving Notification of Documentation Updates...28 * 9.3 Support Resources...28 * 9.4 Trademarks...28 * 9.5 Electrostatic Discharge Caution...28 * 9.6 Glossary...28 * 10 Mechanical, Packaging, And Orderable Information...28 3. **Revision History:** * Title: 4 Revision History * Note: NOTE: Page numbers for previous revisions may differ from page numbers in the current version. 4. **Changes from Revision D (June 2016) to Revision E (May 2023):** * Table-like structure with "Page" column. * Updated the numbering format for tables, figures, and cross-references throughout the document...1 * Add the TPS563252 information...1 * Updated trademark information...1 * Removed color from images throughout the document...1 5. **Changes from Revision C (August 2015) to Revision D (June 2016):** * Table-like structure with "Page" column. * Updated the Pinout image in Pin Configuration And Functions...4 * Changed RθJB for TPS562200 From: 3.4 To: 13.4 in Thermal Information...6 * Section 7.3.1, changed text From: "proportional to the converter input voltage, V_IN, and inversely proportional to the output voltage, V_O" To: "inversely proportional to the converter input voltage, V_IN, and proportional to the output voltage, V_O"...13 6. **Changes from Revision B (July 2014) to Revision C (August 2015):** * Table-like structure with "Page" column. * Changed Features From: Integrated 122 mΩ and 72 mΩ FETs ('562200) To: TPS562200 - 2A converter with Integrated 122 mΩ and 72 mΩ FETs...1 * Changed Features From: Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs ('563200) To: TPS563200 - 3A converter with Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs...1 * Added Section 1: 650 kHz Switching Frequency...1 * Changed Features From: Cycle-By-Cycle Hiccup Over-current Limit To: Cycle-By-Cycle Overcurrent Limit...1 * Added Features: Hiccup-Mode Undervoltage Protection...1 * Changed text in the first paragraph of the Description From: "...in SOT-23 package." To: "in 6 pin SOT-23 package."...1 * Moved Storage temperature range, T_stg From: Handling Ratings To: Absolute Maximum Ratings...5 * Changed the Handling Ratings table to the ESD Ratings table...5 * Changed the TPS562200 Thermal Information values...6 * Changed V_OVP Description in the Electrical Characteristics From: OVP Detect (L > H) To: OVP Detect, and the TYP value From: 125% To: 125% x Vfbth...7 * Changed V_UVP Description in the Electrical Characteristics From: Hiccup detect (H < L) To: Hiccup detect, and the TYP value From: 65% To: 65% x Vfbth...7 * Changed the Output Current (A) scale of Figure 6-7...8 7. **Footer:** * 2 * Submit Document Feedback * Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated * Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200 I will now format this into the requested JSON structure. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 55, 253, 69], "category": "header", "text": "TPS562200, TPS563200"}, {"bbox": [85, 68, 362, 81], "category": "header", "text": "SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"}, {"bbox": [751, 34, 913, 80], "category": "header", "text": "TEXAS INSTRUMENTS\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [415, 103, 584, 121], "category": "title", "text": "Table of Contents"}, {"bbox": [88, 127, 488, 363], "category": "table", "text": "

Changes from Revision D (June 2016) to Revision E (May 2023)Page
• Updated the numbering format for tables, figures, and cross-references throughout the document1
• Add the TPS563252 information1
• Updated trademark information1
• Removed color from images throughout the document1
"}, {"bbox": [88, 530, 909, 627], "category": "table", "text": "
Changes from Revision C (August 2015) to Revision D (June 2016)Page
• Updated the Pinout image in Pin Configuration And Functions4
• Changed \\(R_{\\theta JB}\\) for TPS562200 From: 3.4 To: 13.4 in Thermal Information6
• Section 7.3.1, changed text From: "proportional to the converter input voltage, \\(V_{IN}\\), and inversely proportional to the output voltage, \\(V_{O}\\)" To: "inversely proportional to the converter input voltage, \\(V_{IN}\\), and proportional to the output voltage, \\(V_{O}\\)"13
"}, {"bbox": [88, 640, 910, 918], "category": "table", "text": "
Changes from Revision B (July 2014) to Revision C (August 2015)Page
• Changed Features From: Integrated 122 mΩ and 72 mΩ FETs ('562200) To: TPS562200 - 2A converter with Integrated 122 mΩ and 72 mΩ FETs1
• Changed Features From: Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs ('563200) To: TPS563200 - 3A converter with Integrated 68-mΩ and 39-mΩ FETs1
• Added Section 1: 650 kHz Switching Frequency1
• Changed Features From: Cycle-By-Cycle Hiccup Over-current Limit To: Cycle-By-Cycle Overcurrent Limit1
• Added Features: Hiccup-Mode Undervoltage Protection1
• Changed text in the first paragraph of the Description From: "...in SOT-23 package." To: "in 6 pin SOT-23 package."1
• Moved Storage temperature range, \\(T_{stg}\\) From: Handling Ratings To: Absolute Maximum Ratings5
• Changed the Handling Ratings table to the ESD Ratings table5
• Changed the TPS562200 Thermal Information values6
• Changed \\(V_{OVP}\\) Description in the Electrical Characteristics From: OVP Detect (L > H) To: OVP Detect, and the TYP value From: 125% To: 125% x Vfbth7
• Changed \\(V_{UVP}\\) Description in the Electrical Characteristics From: Hiccup detect (H < L) To: Hiccup detect, and the TYP value From: 65% To: 65% x Vfbth7
• Changed the Output Current (A) scale of Figure 6-78
"}, {"bbox": [86, 951, 97, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "2"}, {"bbox": [127, 950, 296, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Submit Document Feedback"}, {"bbox": [657, 950, 913, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated"}, {"bbox": [363, 975, 636, 988], "category": "footer", "text": "Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200"}] ```
